name: save-choice-transpose-ask
note: UAT r5 F8 (operator 2026-07-19, on the #281 preview: 'I'm stuck with a song in progress. add to song button doesn't work'). The Save-choice row's 'Add to your song' with a DIFFERENTLY-KEYED draft chains the transpose ask MODAL out of the choice modal's own dismissal settle - a NavHistory layer opened inside the prior layer's settle window. The slice-2 goalpost only exercised the ask from the tray's Add (no modal dismiss in flight), so this path shipped unwalked. Contract: the ask row APPEARS and works; 'Shift it to A' commits the D-G-A strip as A-D-E section #4 and lands on the canvas. Red-first on ca6bf4e.
